name: Lee Ann Jones

contactInfo.office: 110 S. Sycamore St., Room 228, Carthage, TX 75633

bio: Lee Ann Jones serves as the Panola County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Panola County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Carthage area.
campaignPromises: Keep Panola County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
